zh.lifeSummary: 當Margareta von Habsburg-Kyburg於大約1272年出生在瑞士爾利吉包格時，她的父親Eberhard I. Graf von Habsburg-Laufenburg und von Kyburg46歲，母親Anna Albrecht17歲。她於1290年7月14日與Dietrich VI. Graf von Kleve結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1333年4月10日在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可列福可列福享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margareta von Habsburg-Kyburg于大约1272年出生在瑞士爾利吉包格时，她的父亲Eberhard I. Graf von Habsburg-Laufenburg und von Kyburg46岁，母亲Anna Albrecht17岁。她于1290年7月14日与Dietrich VI. Graf von Kleve结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1333年4月10日在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可列福可列福享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Margareta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margrethe
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

historicEvents.description: Three valleys in Central Switzerland unite against the counts of Habsburg and fight for autonomy. Cities join the confederacy. They conquer territories in northern and southern Switzerland.
Decisive Battle against the counts of Habsburg.

en.lifeSummary: When Margareta von Habsburg-Kyburg was born about 1272, in Kyburg, Zürich, Switzerland, her father, Eberhard I. Graf von Habsburg-Laufenburg und von Kyburg, was 46 and her mother, Anna Albrecht, was 17. She married Dietrich VI. Graf von Kleve on 14 July 1290. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 10 April 1333, in Cleves, Kleve, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margareta von Habsburg-Kyburg est née environ 1272, à Kyburg, Zurich, Suisse, son père, Eberhard I. Graf von Habsburg-Laufenburg und von Kyburg, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Anna Albrecht, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Dietrich VI. Graf von Kleve le 14 juillet 1290. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 avril 1333, à Kleve, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margareta von Habsburg-Kyburg um 1272 in Kyburg, Zürich, Schweiz geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Eberhard I. Graf von Habsburg-Laufenburg und von Kyburg 46 und ihre Mutter Anna Albrecht 17. Sie hat am 14. Juli 1290 Dietrich VI. Graf von Kleve geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. April 1333 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Kleve, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margareta von Habsburg-Kyburg è nata il circa 1272 nel Kyburg, Zurigo, Svizzera, sua padre, Eberhard I. Graf von Habsburg-Laufenburg und von Kyburg, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Anna Albrecht, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Dietrich VI. Graf von Kleve il 14 luglio 1290. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 10 aprile 1333, nel Kleve, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margareta von Habsburg-Kyburgが約1272年にスイスズuリチクイブルグで生まれた時，父Eberhard I. Graf von Habsburg-Laufenburg und von Kyburgは46歳，母Anna Albrechtは17歳であった。1290年7月14日にDietrich VI. Graf von Kleveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1333年4月10日にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレブクレブで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margareta von Habsburg-Kyburg(이)가 대략 1272년 스위스 즈u리치 키버그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Eberhard I. Graf von Habsburg-Laufenburg und von Kyburg(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna Albrecht(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1290년 7월 14일 Dietrich VI. Graf von Kleve(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1333년 4월 10일 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 클브 클브에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margareta von Habsburg-Kyburg nasceu aproximadamente 1272, em Kyburg, Zürich, Suiça, seu pai, Eberhard I. Graf von Habsburg-Laufenburg und von Kyburg, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Anna Albrecht, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Dietrich VI. Graf von Kleve em 14 de julho de 1290. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de abril de 1333, em Kleve, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margareta von Habsburg-Kyburg родилась около 1272 г. в местности кибург, зuрич, Швейцария, её отцу по имени Eberhard I. Graf von Habsburg-Laufenburg und von Kyburg было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Albrecht, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Dietrich VI. Graf von Kleve 14 июля 1290 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 10 апреля 1333 г. в местности клив, клив, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margareta von Habsburg-Kyburg nació aproximadamente 1272, en Kyburg, Zürich, Suiza, su papá, Eberhard I. Graf von Habsburg-Laufenburg und von Kyburg, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Anna Albrecht, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Dietrich VI. Graf von Kleve el 14 de julio de 1290. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 10 de abril de 1333, en Kleve, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, a la edad de 62 años.
